Name: GENERATOR_PARAM
Description: Comprehensive enemy/spawn generator configuration defining lifecycle rules, AI logic, respawn behavior, and event-driven control systems.

Fields.Name: Max Respawn Count
Fields.Description: Maximum number of times this entity can respawn in a playthrough.

Fields.Name: NG+ Max Respawn Count
Fields.Description: Respawn limit for New Game+ and beyond.

Fields.Name: Event Group ID
Fields.Description: Groups generators for shared event control logic.

Fields.Name: Logic Group ID
Fields.Description: Defines shared AI or behavior logic grouping.

Fields.Name: Respawn Disable Flag ID
Fields.Description: Flag that disables respawning when set.

Fields.Name: Registered Enemy Reference
Fields.Description: Identifier for the enemy or entity type spawned.

Fields.Name: Start Condition Evaluation Type
Fields.Description: Defines how spawn activation conditions are evaluated.

Fields.Name: Start Condition: 1
Fields.Description: First condition required to start generator.

Fields.Name: Start Condition: 2
Fields.Description: Second condition required to start generator.

Fields.Name: Start Condition: 3
Fields.Description: Third condition required to start generator.

Fields.Name: Start Condition Parameter: 1
Fields.Description: Parameter for first start condition.

Fields.Name: Start Condition Parameter: 2
Fields.Description: Parameter for second start condition.

Fields.Name: Start Condition Parameter: 3
Fields.Description: Parameter for third start condition.

Fields.Name: Stop Condition Evaluation Type
Fields.Description: Defines how deactivation conditions are evaluated.

Fields.Name: Stop Condition: 1
Fields.Description: First condition required to stop generator.

Fields.Name: Stop Condition: 2
Fields.Description: Second condition required to stop generator.

Fields.Name: Stop Condition: 3
Fields.Description: Third condition required to stop generator.

Fields.Name: Stop Condition Parameter: 1
Fields.Description: Parameter for first stop condition.

Fields.Name: Stop Condition Parameter: 2
Fields.Description: Parameter for second stop condition.

Fields.Name: Stop Condition Parameter: 3
Fields.Description: Parameter for third stop condition.

Fields.Name: Logic Move Zone: 1
Fields.Description: Movement area assigned to AI logic.

Fields.Name: Logic Move Zone: 2
Fields.Description: Movement area assigned to AI logic.

Fields.Name: Logic Move Zone: 3
Fields.Description: Movement area assigned to AI logic.

Fields.Name: Logic Move Zone: 4
Fields.Description: Movement area assigned to AI logic.

Fields.Name: Logic Move Zone: 5
Fields.Description: Movement area assigned to AI logic.

Fields.Name: Logic Move Zone: 6
Fields.Description: Movement area assigned to AI logic.

Fields.Name: Infinite Spawn Interval
Fields.Description: Time interval between repeated spawns when infinite generation is enabled.

Fields.Name: Infinite Generation Enabled
Fields.Description: Enables continuous spawning behavior.

Fields.Name: Disable Draw Group Removal
Fields.Description: Prevents automatic removal of draw groups.

Fields.Name: Disable Stop During Boss Battle
Fields.Description: Keeps generator active during boss fights.

Fields.Name: Hide HP Gauge
Fields.Description: Disables health bar display for spawned entities.

Fields.Name: Reset Position When Offscreen
Fields.Description: Resets generator position when it becomes invisible.

Fields.Name: Disable Over-Spawn Deletion
Fields.Description: Prevents automatic deletion when spawn limit is exceeded.

Fields.Name: Invincible Outside Boss Battle
Fields.Description: Makes entities invulnerable except during boss battles.

Fields.Name: Network Update Priority
Fields.Description: Determines update priority in multiplayer sessions.

Fields.Name: Bonfire ID
Fields.Description: Associated bonfire ID.

Fields.Name: Return Distance
Fields.Description: Distance threshold for returning to origin or patrol zone.

Fields.Name: Logic Navigation Point: 1
Fields.Description: First navigation waypoint for AI logic.

Fields.Name: Logic Navigation Point: 2
Fields.Description: Second navigation waypoint for AI logic.

Fields.Name: Initial Logic State ID
Fields.Description: Defines the starting AI state.

Fields.Name: Logic Event Flag: 1
Fields.Description: Event flag used in AI logic evaluation.

Fields.Name: Logic Event Flag: 2
Fields.Description: Event flag used in AI logic evaluation.

Fields.Name: Logic Event Flag: 3
Fields.Description: Event flag used in AI logic evaluation.

Fields.Name: Logic Event Flag: 4
Fields.Description: Event flag used in AI logic evaluation.

Fields.Name: Logic Start Interval (seconds)
Fields.Description: Delay before AI becomes active.

Fields.Name: Return Area: 1
Fields.Description: Primary return zone for AI.

Fields.Name: Return Area: 2
Fields.Description: Secondary return zone for AI.

Fields.Name: Return Area: 3
Fields.Description: Tertiary return zone for AI.

Fields.Name: Area Event Variable: 1
Fields.Description: Variable used for area-based event logic.

Fields.Name: Area Event Variable: 2
Fields.Description: Variable used for area-based event logic.

Fields.Name: Global Event Variable: 1
Fields.Description: Global variable used in logic evaluation.

Fields.Name: Global Event Variable: 2
Fields.Description: Global variable used in logic evaluation.

Fields.Name: Multiplayer Time Penalty Reduction
Fields.Description: Amount by which multiplayer limit time is decreased.

Fields.Name: Special Generation Type
Fields.Description: Defines special spawning behavior type.

Fields.Name: Instance Color
Fields.Description: Debug or visualization color for the generator instance.

Fields.Name: First Playthrough Item Drop ID
Fields.Description: Item drop table for initial playthrough.

Fields.Name: NG+ Item Drop ID
Fields.Description: Item drop table for NG+ and beyond.

Fields.Name: Mandatory End Event ID
Fields.Description: Event that must complete per spawn cycle.

Fields.Name: AI Return Standby Range (m)
Fields.Description: Distance at which AI begins return preparation.

Fields.Name: AI Return Type
Fields.Description: Defines how AI returns to its origin.
